ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of company headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for customer inquiries */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_premiums" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance company */,
  "adults" REAL /* Premium amount for adults */,
  "seniors" REAL /* Premium amount for seniors */,
  "teens" REAL /* Premium amount for teens */,
  "young_adults" REAL /* Premium amount for young adults */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium rates became effective */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region for which the premium rates apply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_premiums_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic segment */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the demographic segment */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the demographic segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium history entry */,
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the premium entry associated with the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Previous value of the premium */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the premium */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in premium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_history_premium_id FOREIGN KEY ("premium_id") REFERENCES insurance_premiums ("premium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "filter_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for filtering data in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments and suggestions */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the feedback has been addressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "company_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first insurance company */,
  "company_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second insurance company */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_results" TEXT /* Results of the comparison (e.g., better rates, notable differences) */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., price, coverage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_comparisons_company_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_1") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_comparisons_company_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_2") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom the setting is configured */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "default_view" TEXT /* Default view setting for the user (e.g., grid, list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., consumer, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
